cases.name: bootstrap_set_lock_timeout
cases.sql: SET LOCK_TIMEOUT 10000

cases.name: bootstrap_server_properties_and_transport
cases.sql: DECLARE @edition sysname; SET @edition = cast(SERVERPROPERTY(N'EDITION') as sysname); SELECT case when @edition = N'SQL Azure' then 2 else 1 end as DatabaseEngineType, SERVERPROPERTY('EngineEdition') AS DatabaseEngineEdition, SERVERPROPERTY('ProductVersion') AS ProductVersion, @@MICROSOFTVERSION AS MicrosoftVersion; select host_platform from sys.dm_os_host_info; if @edition = N'SQL Azure' select 'TCP' as ConnectionProtocol else exec ('select CONVERT(nvarchar(40),CONNECTIONPROPERTY(''net_transport'')) as ConnectionProtocol')

cases.name: bootstrap_sys_configurations_probe
cases.sql: select value_in_use from sys.configurations where configuration_id = 16384

cases.name: bootstrap_syspolicy_configuration_probe
cases.sql: SELECT current_value FROM msdb.dbo.syspolicy_configuration WHERE name = 'Enabled'

cases.name: bootstrap_srv_role_member_mask
cases.sql: select is_srvrolemember('sysadmin') * 1 +is_srvrolemember('serveradmin') * 2 +is_srvrolemember('setupadmin') * 4 +is_srvrolemember('securityadmin') * 8 +is_srvrolemember('processadmin') * 16 +is_srvrolemember('dbcreator') * 32 +is_srvrolemember('diskadmin') * 64+ is_srvrolemember('bulkadmin') * 128

cases.name: bootstrap_server_permissions_null_probe
cases.sql: SELECT HAS_PERMS_BY_NAME(NULL, NULL, 'VIEW ANY DATABASE') AS can_view

cases.name: bootstrap_is_polybase_installed_probe
cases.sql: SELECT CAST(SERVERPROPERTY('IsPolyBaseInstalled') AS bit) AS [IsPolyBaseInstalled]

cases.name: bootstrap_alwayson_probe
cases.sql: DECLARE @alwayson INT; EXECUTE @alwayson = master.dbo.xp_qv N'3641190370', @@SERVICENAME; SELECT ISNULL(@alwayson, -1) AS [AlwaysOn]

cases.name: bootstrap_is_hadr_enabled_probe
cases.sql: SELECT CAST(SERVERPROPERTY(N'IsHadrEnabled') AS bit) AS [IsHadrEnabled]

cases.name: bootstrap_contained_ag_session_probe
cases.sql: IF OBJECT_ID(N'sys.sp_MSIsContainedAGSession', N'P') IS NOT NULL BEGIN DECLARE @x int; EXECUTE @x = sys.sp_MSIsContainedAGSession; SELECT @x END ELSE SELECT 0

cases.name: bootstrap_edition_probe
cases.sql: SELECT CAST(SERVERPROPERTY(N'Edition') AS sysname) AS [Edition]

cases.name: bootstrap_database_property_probe
cases.sql: SELECT DATABASEPROPERTYEX(DB_NAME(), 'Collation') AS [DatabaseCollation], DATABASEPROPERTYEX(DB_NAME(), 'Status') AS [DatabaseStatus]

cases.name: database_property_collation_probe
cases.sql: SELECT DATABASEPROPERTYEX(DB_NAME(), 'Collation') AS [DatabaseCollation], DATABASEPROPERTYEX(DB_NAME(), 'IsReadOnly') AS [DatabaseIsReadOnly]

cases.name: server_property_edition_probe
cases.sql: SELECT CAST(SERVERPROPERTY(N'Edition') AS sysname) AS [Edition], CAST(SERVERPROPERTY(N'EngineEdition') AS int) AS [EngineEdition], CAST(SERVERPROPERTY(N'ProductVersion') AS sysname) AS [ProductVersion]

cases.name: bootstrap_databases_enumeration_probe
cases.sql: SELECT name, database_id FROM sys.databases WHERE HAS_DBACCESS(name) = 1 ORDER BY name

cases.name: bootstrap_databases_contains_tsql_wasm
cases.sql: SELECT name, database_id FROM sys.databases WHERE name = 'tsql_wasm'

cases.name: bootstrap_user_databases_include_tsql_wasm
cases.sql: SELECT dtb.name AS [Database_Name] FROM sys.databases AS dtb WHERE (CAST(case when dtb.name in ('master','model','msdb','tempdb') then 1 else dtb.is_distributor end AS bit)=0) ORDER BY [Database_Name] ASC

cases.name: tables_list_from_sys_tables
cases.sql: SELECT tbl.name AS [Name], SCHEMA_NAME(tbl.schema_id) AS [Schema], 'Server[@Name=' + quotename(CAST(serverproperty(N'Servername') AS sysname),'''') + ']' + '/Database[@Name=' + quotename(db_name(),'''') + ']' + '/Table[@Name=' + quotename(tbl.name,'''') + ' and @Schema=' + quotename(SCHEMA_NAME(tbl.schema_id),'''') + ']' AS [Urn], tbl.create_date AS [CreateDate], CAST(tbl.is_memory_optimized AS bit) AS [IsMemoryOptimized], CAST(CASE idx.type WHEN 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS bit) AS [HasClusteredColumnStoreIndex] FROM sys.tables AS tbl LEFT JOIN sys.indexes AS idx ON idx.object_id = tbl.object_id AND idx.type = 5 WHERE tbl.is_ms_shipped = 0 ORDER BY [Schema], [Name]

cases.name: tables_list_from_ssms_like_query
cases.sql: SELECT tbl.name AS [Name], SCHEMA_NAME(tbl.schema_id) AS [Schema], CAST(tbl.is_memory_optimized AS bit) AS [IsMemoryOptimized], CAST(CASE idx.type WHEN 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS bit) AS [HasClusteredColumnStoreIndex], CAST(CASE WHEN 'PS' = dsidx.type THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS bit) AS [IsPartitioned], CAST(ISNULL((SELECT distinct 1 FROM sys.all_columns WHERE object_id = tbl.object_id AND is_sparse = 1), 0) AS bit) AS [HasSparseColumn], CAST(CASE WHEN (SELECT major_id FROM sys.extended_properties WHERE major_id = tbl.object_id AND minor_id = 0 AND class = 1 AND name = N'microsoft_database_tools_support') IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS bit) AS [HasMdtSupport] FROM sys.tables AS tbl LEFT JOIN sys.indexes AS idx ON idx.object_id = tbl.object_id AND (idx.index_id < 2 OR (tbl.is_memory_optimized = 1 AND idx.index_id = (SELECT MIN(index_id) FROM sys.indexes WHERE object_id = tbl.object_id))) LEFT OUTER JOIN sys.data_spaces AS dsidx ON dsidx.data_space_id = idx.data_space_id WHERE CAST(ISNULL(tbl.ledger_type, 0) AS int) = 0 AND tbl.is_filetable = 0 AND CAST(tbl.is_memory_optimized AS bit) = 0 AND tbl.temporal_type = 0 AND CAST(tbl.is_external AS bit) = 0 AND CAST(tbl.is_node AS bit) = 0 AND CAST(tbl.is_edge AS bit) = 0 AND tbl.is_ms_shipped = 0 ORDER BY [Schema], [Name]

cases.name: tables_list_with_dropped_ledger_filter
cases.sql: SELECT tbl.name AS [Name], SCHEMA_NAME(tbl.schema_id) AS [Schema], CAST(ISNULL(tbl.ledger_type, 0) AS int) AS [LedgerType], CAST(ISNULL(tbl.is_dropped_ledger_table, 0) AS bit) AS [IsDroppedLedgerTable] FROM sys.tables AS tbl LEFT OUTER JOIN sys.tables AS historyTable ON historyTable.object_id = tbl.history_table_id WHERE CAST(ISNULL(tbl.ledger_type, 0) AS int) = 2 AND CAST(ISNULL(tbl.is_dropped_ledger_table, 0) AS bit) = 0

cases.name: tables_and_views_list_from_sys_objects
cases.sql: SELECT s.name AS schema_name, o.name, o.type, o.type_desc, o.is_ms_shipped FROM sys.objects o INNER JOIN sys.schemas s ON s.schema_id = o.schema_id WHERE o.type_desc IN ('USER_TABLE', 'VIEW') AND o.is_ms_shipped = 0 ORDER BY s.name, o.name

cases.name: table_columns_from_ssms_like_query
cases.sql: SELECT clmns.name AS [Name], CAST(ISNULL(cik.index_column_id, 0) AS bit) AS [InPrimaryKey], CAST(ISNULL((select TOP 1 1 from sys.foreign_key_columns AS colfk where colfk.parent_column_id = clmns.column_id and colfk.parent_object_id = clmns.object_id), 0) AS bit) AS [IsForeignKey], usrt.name AS [DataType], ISNULL(baset.name, N'') AS [SystemType], CAST(CASE WHEN baset.name IN (N'nchar', N'nvarchar') AND clmns.max_length <> -1 THEN clmns.max_length/2 ELSE clmns.max_length END AS int) AS [Length], CAST(clmns.precision AS int) AS [NumericPrecision], CAST(clmns.scale AS int) AS [NumericScale], clmns.is_nullable AS [Nullable], clmns.is_computed AS [Computed], ISNULL(s2clmns.name, N'') AS [XmlSchemaNamespaceSchema], ISNULL(xscclmns.name, N'') AS [XmlSchemaNamespace], ISNULL((case clmns.is_xml_document when 1 then 2 else 1 end), 0) AS [XmlDocumentConstraint], CAST(clmns.is_sparse AS bit) AS [IsSparse], CAST(clmns.is_column_set AS bit) AS [IsColumnSet], clmns.column_id AS [ID], CAST(clmns.is_dropped_ledger_column AS bit) AS [IsDroppedLedgerColumn] FROM sys.tables AS tbl INNER JOIN sys.all_columns AS clmns ON clmns.object_id = tbl.object_id LEFT OUTER JOIN sys.indexes AS ik ON ik.object_id = clmns.object_id and 1 = ik.is_primary_key LEFT OUTER JOIN sys.index_columns AS cik ON cik.index_id = ik.index_id and cik.column_id = clmns.column_id and cik.object_id = clmns.object_id and 0 = cik.is_included_column LEFT OUTER JOIN sys.types AS usrt ON usrt.user_type_id = clmns.user_type_id LEFT OUTER JOIN sys.types AS baset ON (baset.user_type_id = clmns.system_type_id and baset.user_type_id = baset.system_type_id) or ((baset.system_type_id = clmns.system_type_id) and (baset.user_type_id = clmns.user_type_id) and (baset.is_user_defined = 0) and (baset.is_assembly_type = 1)) LEFT OUTER JOIN sys.xml_schema_collections AS xscclmns ON xscclmns.xml_collection_id = clmns.xml_collection_id LEFT OUTER JOIN sys.schemas AS s2clmns ON s2clmns.schema_id = xscclmns.schema_id WHERE (CAST(clmns.is_dropped_ledger_column AS bit) = 0) and ((tbl.name = N'Customers' and SCHEMA_NAME(tbl.schema_id) = N'dbo')) ORDER BY [ID] ASC

cases.name: table_indexes_from_ssms_like_query
cases.sql: SELECT i.name AS [Name], i.is_primary_key + 2 * i.is_unique_constraint AS [IndexKeyType], CAST(CASE i.type WHEN 1 THEN 0 WHEN 4 THEN 4 WHEN 3 THEN CASE xi.xml_index_type WHEN 0 THEN 2 WHEN 1 THEN 3 WHEN 2 THEN 7 WHEN 3 THEN 8 END WHEN 4 THEN 4 WHEN 6 THEN 5 WHEN 7 THEN 6 WHEN 5 THEN 9 ELSE 1 END AS tinyint) AS [IndexType], CAST(CASE WHEN ((SELECT o.type FROM sys.objects o WHERE o.object_id = i.object_id) = 'U') THEN CASE WHEN ((SELECT tbl.is_memory_optimized FROM sys.tables tbl WHERE tbl.object_id = i.object_id) = 1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ELSE CASE WHEN ((SELECT tt.is_memory_optimized FROM sys.table_types tt WHERE tt.type_table_object_id = i.object_id) = 1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END END AS bit) AS [IsMemoryOptimized] FROM sys.tables AS tbl INNER JOIN sys.indexes AS i ON (i.index_id > 0 and i.is_hypothetical = 0) AND (i.object_id = tbl.object_id) LEFT OUTER JOIN sys.xml_indexes AS xi ON xi.object_id = i.object_id AND xi.index_id = i.index_id WHERE (i.is_primary_key + 2 * i.is_unique_constraint = 1 and CAST(CASE WHEN ((SELECT o.type FROM sys.objects o WHERE o.object_id = i.object_id) = 'U') THEN CASE WHEN ((SELECT tbl.is_memory_optimized FROM sys.tables tbl WHERE tbl.object_id = i.object_id) = 1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ELSE CASE WHEN ((SELECT tt.is_memory_optimized FROM sys.table_types tt WHERE tt.type_table_object_id = i.object_id) = 1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END END AS bit) = 1) and ((tbl.name = N'Customers' and SCHEMA_NAME(tbl.schema_id) = N'dbo')) ORDER BY [Name] ASC

cases.name: table_foreign_keys_from_ssms_like_query
cases.sql: SELECT cstr.name AS [Name] FROM sys.tables AS tbl INNER JOIN sys.foreign_keys AS cstr ON cstr.parent_object_id = tbl.object_id LEFT OUTER JOIN sys.indexes AS ki ON ki.index_id = cstr.key_index_id and ki.object_id = cstr.referenced_object_id WHERE (CAST(CASE WHEN ((SELECT o.type FROM sys.objects o WHERE o.object_id = ki.object_id) = 'U') THEN CASE WHEN ((SELECT tbl.is_memory_optimized FROM sys.tables tbl WHERE tbl.object_id = ki.object_id) = 1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ELSE CASE WHEN ((SELECT tt.is_memory_optimized FROM sys.table_types tt WHERE tt.type_table_object_id = ki.object_id) = 1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END END AS bit) = 0) and ((tbl.name = N'Customers' and SCHEMA_NAME(tbl.schema_id) = N'dbo')) ORDER BY [Name] ASC

cases.name: routines_list_from_sys_routines
cases.sql: SELECT ROUTINE_SCHEMA, ROUTINE_NAME, ROUTINE_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.ROUTINES ORDER BY ROUTINE_SCHEMA, ROUTINE_NAME

cases.name: view_column_usage_for_customer_orders
cases.sql: SELECT TABLE_SCHEMA, TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.VIEW_COLUMN_USAGE WHERE VIEW_SCHEMA = 'dbo' AND VIEW_NAME = 'vCustomerOrders' ORDER BY TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME

cases.name: indexes_list_for_customers
cases.sql: SELECT i.name, i.type_desc, i.is_unique, i.is_primary_key FROM sys.indexes i INNER JOIN sys.tables t ON i.object_id = t.object_id WHERE t.name = 'Customers' AND t.schema_id = SCHEMA_ID('dbo')

cases.name: foreign_keys_list_for_orders
cases.sql: SELECT name, OBJECT_NAME(referenced_object_id) as referenced_table_name FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID('dbo.Orders')

cases.name: constraints_key_constraints_for_customers
cases.sql: SELECT kc.name AS [Name], kc.type_desc AS [TypeDesc] FROM sys.key_constraints AS kc INNER JOIN sys.tables AS t ON t.object_id = kc.parent_object_id WHERE t.name = 'Customers' ORDER BY kc.name

cases.name: triggers_list_from_sys_triggers
cases.sql: SELECT name, object_id, parent_id, type_desc, is_instead_of_trigger FROM sys.triggers ORDER BY name

cases.name: schemas_list_all
cases.sql: SELECT name, schema_id, principal_id FROM sys.schemas ORDER BY name

cases.name: views_list_all
cases.sql: SELECT v.name, s.name AS schema_name, v.object_id, v.create_date, v.modify_date FROM sys.views v INNER JOIN sys.schemas s ON v.schema_id = s.schema_id WHERE v.is_ms_shipped = 0 ORDER BY s.name, v.name

cases.name: view_columns_for_customer_orders
cases.sql: SELECT name FROM sys.views WHERE is_ms_shipped = 0

cases.name: routine_parameters_list
cases.sql: SELECT p.name AS parameter_name, t.name AS type_name, p.max_length, p.precision, p.scale, p.is_output, p.parameter_id FROM sys.parameters p INNER JOIN sys.procedures r ON p.object_id = r.object_id INNER JOIN sys.types t ON p.user_type_id = t.user_type_id WHERE r.name = 'uspGetOrderDetails' AND r.schema_id = SCHEMA_ID('dbo') ORDER BY p.parameter_id

cases.name: routine_definition_from_sql_modules
cases.sql: SELECT m.definition, m.object_id FROM sys.sql_modules m WHERE m.object_id = OBJECT_ID('dbo.uspGetOrderDetails')

cases.name: partition_functions_list
cases.sql: SELECT name, function_id, type_desc, create_date FROM sys.partition_functions ORDER BY name

cases.name: partition_schemes_list
cases.sql: SELECT name, data_space_id, type_desc FROM sys.partition_schemes ORDER BY name

cases.name: stats_list_for_customers
cases.sql: SELECT name FROM sys.stats WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('dbo.Customers') ORDER BY name

cases.name: extended_properties_for_customers
cases.sql: SELECT ep.name, ep.value, ep.minor_id, CASE WHEN ep.class = 1 THEN 'TABLE' WHEN ep.class = 2 THEN 'COLUMN' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS class_desc FROM sys.extended_properties ep WHERE ep.major_id = OBJECT_ID('dbo.Customers') ORDER BY ep.class, ep.minor_id

cases.name: database_principals_list
cases.sql: SELECT name, principal_id, type, type_desc, default_schema_name, create_date, modify_date FROM sys.database_principals WHERE type IN ('S', 'U', 'G') ORDER BY name

cases.name: database_permissions_list
cases.sql: SELECT dp.class, dp.major_id, dp.minor_id, dp.grantee_principal_id, dp.grantor_principal_id, dp.type, dp.permission_name, dp.state, dp.state_desc FROM sys.database_permissions dp ORDER BY dp.class, dp.major_id

cases.name: database_role_members_list
cases.sql: SELECT r.name AS role_name, m.name AS member_name, m.type AS member_type FROM sys.database_role_members rm INNER JOIN sys.database_principals r ON rm.role_principal_id = r.principal_id INNER JOIN sys.database_principals m ON rm.member_principal_id = m.principal_id ORDER BY r.name, m.name

cases.name: table_types_list
cases.sql: SELECT tt.name, tt.type_table_object_id, tt.is_user_defined, s.name AS schema_name FROM sys.table_types tt INNER JOIN sys.schemas s ON tt.schema_id = s.schema_id WHERE tt.is_ms_shipped = 0 ORDER BY s.name, tt.name

cases.name: table_type_columns_list
cases.sql: SELECT c.name AS column_name, t.name AS type_name, c.max_length, c.precision, c.scale, c.is_nullable, c.column_id FROM sys.columns c INNER JOIN sys.table_types tt ON c.object_id = tt.type_table_object_id INNER JOIN sys.types t ON c.user_type_id = t.user_type_id WHERE tt.name = 'OrderType' AND tt.schema_id = SCHEMA_ID('dbo') ORDER BY c.column_id

cases.name: index_columns_detail_for_customers
cases.sql: SELECT object_id, index_id, column_id, key_ordinal FROM sys.index_columns WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('dbo.Customers') ORDER BY index_id, key_ordinal

cases.name: foreign_keys_columns_detail
cases.sql: SELECT name, parent_object_id, referenced_object_id FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID('dbo.Orders')

cases.name: check_constraints_list
cases.sql: SELECT cc.name, cc.definition, cc.object_id, cc.parent_object_id FROM sys.check_constraints cc INNER JOIN sys.tables t ON cc.parent_object_id = t.object_id WHERE t.name = 'Orders' ORDER BY cc.name

cases.name: default_constraints_list
cases.sql: SELECT dc.name, dc.definition, dc.object_id, dc.parent_object_id FROM sys.default_constraints dc INNER JOIN sys.tables t ON dc.parent_object_id = t.object_id WHERE t.name = 'Orders' ORDER BY dc.name

cases.name: procedures_list_all
cases.sql: SELECT name, object_id, schema_id FROM sys.procedures WHERE is_ms_shipped = 0 ORDER BY name

cases.name: functions_list_all
cases.sql: SELECT name, object_id, schema_id FROM sys.functions ORDER BY name

cases.name: filegroups_list
cases.sql: SELECT name, type, type_desc, is_read_only, is_default FROM sys.filegroups ORDER BY name

cases.name: data_spaces_list
cases.sql: SELECT name, data_space_id, type, type_desc FROM sys.data_spaces ORDER BY name

cases.name: assembly_modules_list
cases.sql: SELECT o.name, o.object_id, am.assembly_id, am.assembly_class, am.assembly_method FROM sys.assembly_modules am INNER JOIN sys.objects o ON am.object_id = o.object_id ORDER BY o.name

cases.name: xml_indexes_list
cases.sql: SELECT xi.name, xi.object_id, xi.index_id, xi.xml_index_type, xi.path_id FROM sys.xml_indexes xi INNER JOIN sys.tables t ON xi.object_id = t.object_id WHERE t.name = 'Customers' ORDER BY xi.name

cases.name: identity_columns_list
cases.sql: SELECT object_id, column_id, name, seed_value, increment_value, is_not_for_replication FROM sys.identity_columns ORDER BY name

cases.name: computed_columns_list
cases.sql: SELECT object_id, column_id, name, is_computed, is_persisted FROM sys.computed_columns ORDER BY name

cases.name: all_objects_list_user_tables
cases.sql: SELECT object_id, name, type, type_desc, is_ms_shipped FROM sys.all_objects WHERE type_desc IN ('USER_TABLE', 'VIEW') AND is_ms_shipped = 0 ORDER BY name

cases.name: sql_expression_dependencies_empty
cases.sql: SELECT referencing_id, referenced_id, is_schema_bound FROM sys.sql_expression_dependencies ORDER BY referencing_id
